x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Responsible Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of the party who is responsible for the certificate. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Signatory
x-enumeration-literals.description: Person who binds himself or herself, or the entity he or she is authorized to represent, by his or her signature on the document. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Notifying Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identifies the party that notifies the content of a document to a third party. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Checking Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of the person who checked the document and/or the signature. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Document Validating Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Identification of the person who validated the signature. ISO20022
